params.name: cursor
params.description: ISO 8601 timestamp cursor for pagination (jobs created before this time)

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return (1-1000, default: 100)

params.name: types
params.description: Comma-separated list of job types to filter (e.g., "flux,k1,externalImage")

items.docs: List jobs with pagination and filtering. Returns jobs belonging to the authenticated user.

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a job

items.docs: Get a job by ID

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a job

items.docs: Delete a job by ID

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return (1-1000, default: 100)

items.docs: List assets with pagination.
Upload a new asset (image, video, audio, or 3D model). Accepts multipart/form-data with a file and optional description. Maximum file size: 75MB.
Get a single asset by ID
Delete an asset.

Train a custom style (LoRA) with simplified parameters. Uses intelligent defaults based on the training type (Default/Style/Object/Character).

**Note:** Trained styles are private and only usable by the API user that created them. To allow other workspace members to use the style, share it with the workspace using `POST /styles/{id}/share/workspace`.
| Model | Compute Units/Step |
|-------|-------------------|
| **qwen** | ~8.3 |
| **wan22** | ~5.3 |
| **flux_schnell** | ~3.4 |
| **wan** | ~3.4
List styles with pagination and filtering. Returns public styles, user-created styles, or shared styles based on the filter parameter.

info.name: Get a single style by ID

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a style

items.docs: Get a single style by ID. Returns public styles or your own private styles.

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a style

items.docs: Update style properties. Currently supports updating the public visibility of a style you own.

info.name: Get a shareable link for a style

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a style

items.docs: Generate or retrieve a shareable link for a style you own. The link allows others to access the style.

info.name: Share a style with your workspace

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a style

items.docs: Share a style you own with your API workspace. All members of the workspace will be able to use the style.

info.name: Remove a style from your workspace

params.name: id
params.description: A unique identifier for a style

items.docs: Remove a style you own from your API workspace. Workspace members will no longer have access to the style.

info.name: Get a node app by version ID

items.docs: Get a single node app by version ID. Returns the node app details including input/output schemas.
Execute a node app by version ID. The request body should contain the input data as a JSON object matching the node app's input schema. Returns a job that can be tracked using /jobs/{id}.
